name: Netherlands
description:
He's making the first move, weird.

He doesn't have an official name so I used my favorite, Abel Govert, and the other names are ass (other than Lars). This is self indulgent but if you wanna use it, go ahead, idc lol

I really like Netherlands, he's my favorite!! Hetalia is my main hyperfixation rn.

I really don't like this one, there's this urge that it's inaccurate or just not good enough. I don't like criticism, even if it's constructive, I'll take it but it just gives me this itch.sorry
creator: Mercury_Darling
